_meta.description: Official CrPC (Code of Criminal Procedure, 1973) -> BNSS (Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023) correspondence, parsed from the NCRB Corresponding Section Table.
_meta.transition_rule: Matters on or after 2024-07-01 fall under the BNSS; earlier matters remain under the CrPC.
_meta.verification_note: Mapping data is from the official NCRB Corresponding Section Table; 1 human clarifying note(s) merged from _curated_overlay.json.
